errors.no_access: You do not have access to this group
errors.not_member: You are not a member of this group
errors.already_member: You are already a member of this group
errors.pending_join_request: A join request is already pending
errors.join_request_wrong_group: This join request does not belong to this group
errors.request_already_processed: This request has already been processed
errors.user_not_found_by_email: No user found with this email
errors.only_invite_cancelable: Only INVITE type requests can be cancelled
errors.only_pending_cancelable: Only pending invites can be cancelled
errors.only_pending_resendable: Only pending invites can be resent
errors.cannot_change_own_role: You cannot change your own role
errors.default_role_not_found: Default role not found. Please run the database seed.
errors.cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove yourself. Please use the leave group feature
errors.cannot_transfer_to_self: You cannot transfer ownership to yourself
errors.new_owner_not_in_group: The user to become the new OWNER was not found in the group
errors.group_not_in_list: A group you do not belong to is included
errors.owner_cannot_leave: OWNER cannot leave the group. Please transfer OWNER privileges to another member or delete the group
errors.owner_role_cannot_change: OWNER role cannot be changed. Please use the ownership transfer feature
errors.owner_role_cannot_assign: OWNER role cannot be assigned. Please use the ownership transfer feature
errors.invite_auto_approved: INVITE type requests are automatically approved when the user joins via invite code

success.join_requested: Join request sent. Please wait for admin approval.
